title: Whole Wheat Halomi
description: A smoky and velvety Whole Wheat Halomi dish with a nostalgic flavor, perfect for breakfast, halal-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine whole wheat flour, salt, and water. Knead the dough until it forms into a smooth ball.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and coriander seeds; let them sizzle for about 30 seconds to get that smoky flavor.
Gently fold half of the kneaded dough into the heated oil, allowing the other half to rest while you finish cooking. Cook until golden brown and crisp on both sides.
Drain excess oil and transfer halomi to a serving dish. Garnish with finely chopped fresh coriander for added freshness.
